record.field:
Dear ${object.contact_name or 'there'},

Thank you for your interest. I wanted to reach out and introduce myself as your point of contact.

I'd love to learn more about your needs and explore how we can help. Would you be available for a brief call this week?

Best regards

Hi ${object.contact_name or 'there'},

I wanted to follow up on our previous conversation. Have you had a chance to review the information I shared?

I'm happy to answer any questions or schedule a deeper dive into the solution.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Dear ${object.contact_name or 'there'},

Please find attached our customized proposal based on our discussions.

Key highlights:

  • Tailored solution addressing your specific needs
  • Competitive pricing with flexible payment terms
  • Dedicated support and implementation plan

I'd welcome the opportunity to walk you through the details at your convenience.

Hi ${object.contact_name or 'there'},

It's been a while since we last connected. I wanted to check in and see if your needs have changed or if there's anything new we can help with.

We've made some exciting updates recently that might be of interest to you.

Would you be open to a quick catch-up?

Dear ${object.contact_name or 'there'},

I hope you've had a chance to review everything. We're excited about the opportunity to work together.

To help us get started, could you let me know:

  • Any remaining questions or concerns?
  • Your preferred timeline for getting started?

I'm here to make the process as smooth as possible.
